entry.title: Bill 58 (Hawaiʻi County): Adopted → —
entry.content:
AMENDS THE PARKS AND RECREATIONAL FACILITY SCHEDULE, CHAPTER 15, ARTICLE 8, SECTION 15-68.1, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), BY RENAMING KAŪMANA LANI PARK AS “YET SUNG CHANG PARK” IN HONOR OF YET SUNG CHANG

Status: Adopted → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-07-23

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 58 (Hawaiʻi County) — Adopted
entry.content:
AMENDS THE PARKS AND RECREATIONAL FACILITY SCHEDULE, CHAPTER 15, ARTICLE 8, SECTION 15-68.1, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), BY RENAMING KAŪMANA LANI PARK AS “YET SUNG CHANG PARK” IN HONOR OF YET SUNG CHANG

Latest action: Council: Bill 58 passes second & final reading - 07/23/25

View on the council site
